title: Personalised Don't Panic White 11oz Large Mug Cup
features: Shopagift Personalised Don't Panic 11oz Large Mug Cup
Designed and Made In-House and Perfect as a Gift. The Design is Printed on Both Sides.
The 11oz Mug is Dishwasher and Microwave Safe.
The Mug will Arrived Boxed, Safe and Secure. Original TM Licensed Product.
Suitable for Various Hot or Cold Drinks and Beverages.
description: Shopagift have thousands of mugs including this stunning creation. Our 11oz mugs feature funny slogans and are perfect as novelty gifts, joke gifts, family or for that someone special. This ceramic 11oz mug cup is perfect for a drink and the design is printed using high tech equipment ensuring it is dishwasher safe and microwave safe. Buy a mug for Mum. Dad, Grandma. Grandad or your Boss at work. We have sayings that are suitable for all. We also sell matching products - view our entire collection. Our designs will certainly put a big smile on the recipients face especially as a birthday or Christmas gift. Whatever the occasion Shopagift mugs will add some magic to your special day.
